title: Trump convenes in Situation Room for 'final determination' on Iran deal
shortDescription: President Trump said he plans to gather with top aides in the White House Situation Room to make a 'final determination' on a deal with Iran

title: 'Still TBD' whether Trump will sign off on Iran deal, Vance says
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance said the Trump administration is "very close" to agreeing to a deal with Iran but is "not there yet."

title: Judge blocks $1.8B Trump 'anti-weaponization' fund
shortDescription: A judge temporarily blocked Trump's $1.8B fund to compensate people investigated by the Justice Department, which critics have called a slush fund.

title: Who gets first votes in Democrats’ 2028 race? | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Twelve states make their case to lead 2028 voting, a role that brings major influence, media attention and campaign cash.

title: Who has not canceled their performance for Trump's National Mall Fair?
shortDescription: Days after the musical lineup for Donald Trump's Great American State Fair in Washington DC was announced, many of the performers have dropped out.

title: US news today: Jill Biden reflects in new memoir
shortDescription: Memoir offers revelations and settles scores and more news to start your Friday.

title: Harris went 'prosecutor mode' for Joe Biden's endorsement, Jill Biden says
shortDescription: Walking off stage after the debate with Trump, Joe Biden whispered, "I really f---ed up, didn't I?" Jill Biden whispered back, "Yes, you did."

title: Jill Biden supporting family and country through the decades
shortDescription: Former first lady Jill Biden announced that she will release her White House memoir, "View from the East Wing," on June 2.

title: Army veteran known for Trump displays dies after attack outside home
shortDescription: An Army veteran died after an assault at his California home, according to reports citing police. A Navy veteran has pleaded not guilty in connection to the attack.

title: What's the beef? False claims of veganism are heating up this Texas election
shortDescription: As Texas’ closely-watched Senate race heats up, Ken Paxton is painting James Talarico as out of touch and too radical for the Lone Star state.

title: Trump portrait proposed for $250 dollar bill
shortDescription: A proposal to put President Trump on a new $250 dollar bill sparks debate over living people from appearing on U.S. currency.

title: Bessent calls Newsom plan to tax payments from Trump fund 'stupid'
shortDescription: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent dismissed California Gov. Gavin Newsom's proposal to tax payouts from Trump's reparations fund as 'stupid.'

title: Trump Accounts app is live
shortDescription: A mobile app for Trump Accounts launched on May 28. The government is seeding $1,000 to the accounts for kids born between 2025 and 2028.

title: E. Jean Carroll lawsuits against Trump focus of new DOJ criminal probe
shortDescription: A source tells USA TODAY the focus is a nonprofit funded by Reid Hoffman that supported Carroll's suit alleging Trump sexually assaulted her.

title: Trump news, schedule and updates for May 28 from Trump Connect
shortDescription: See what President Donald Trump spoke about at the Cabinet meeting yesterday. Plus, the Trump Accounts app is now live. It's the Trump news rundown.

title: Negotiators reach Iran deal, but Trump, Tehran must still sign off
shortDescription: Trump has yet to approve the deal. Iran's leadership also hasn't signed off yet.

title: Trump sanctuary-city threat could snarl NYC World Cup travel
shortDescription: A idea to halt international flights flying into sanctuary-city airports could cause major disruptions for millions of travelers.
